Table	Create Table
audit_history	CREATE TABLE `audit_history` (
  `id` int(11) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `period` varchar(100) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `timezone` varchar(100) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `performanceSummary` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `workflowAnalysis` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `conversionAnalysis` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `codeRecommendations` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `prioritizedActions` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `rawMetrics` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `totalPageViews` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `uniqueVisitors` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `totalEvents` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `avgDuration` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `totalSubmissions` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `weeklySubmissions` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `emailSubject` varchar(500) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `emailBody` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `emailSent` enum('pending','sent','failed') COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`) /*T![clustered_index] CLUSTERED */
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci
